conflict: Ada refuses to be treated as a data source, and Marisol fears disclosure will end both help and desire.
consequence: They become physically intimate and Marisol discloses the relapse, creating a more honest but higher-stakes bond.
must_land_beats: A quiet meal scene that is not strategic and includes humor unrelated to the core mystery.
Ada sets explicit boundaries about work files and personal space.
Intimacy scene changes relationship leverage and vulnerability.
Marisol's confession of relapse is met with conditional trust, not rescue fantasy.
objective: Rebuild trust with Ada while deciding whether intimacy is possible under active instability.
